# Type Alias: ScorerOptions

## Properties

### aggregation?

> `optional` **aggregation**: [`Aggregation`](../../aggregations/type-aliases/Aggregation.md)

Aggregation function for combining scores across multiple trials.
Defaults to Mean() if not specified.
